name: Land Run Links
address: 3200 S Santa Fe Ave Suite 102, Moore, OK 73160
about: Land Run Links is an indoor golf simulator venue in Oklahoma City, featuring Golfzon TwoVision NX technology in all bays. It offers year-round play regardless of weather, with realistic course simulations including Pebble Beach and St. Andrews. The facility provides flexible booking options, including hourly rates and memberships (Pro, Tour, Corporate), catering to both casual players and serious golfers. It also hosts corporate events, leagues, and group gatherings, with plans to expand services like food truck partnerships and a pro shop.
why_golfers_like_it: Ultra-realistic graphics with Golfzon TwoVision NX simulators
Real-time ball tracking and swing analysis technology
Weather-independent play year-round with no daylight cutoffs
Flexible memberships and easy online booking system

food_and_drink.notes: Offers snacks, chips, and candy for purchase. Outside food is permitted, and food trucks are available for events.
Does not sell or permit alcoholic beverages on the premises.

simulator_hardware.notes: All bays equipped with this premium simulator technology

faq.question: Do I need my own clubs?
faq.answer: Players should bring their own golf clubs, as rentals are not yet available but are coming soon.

faq.question: Can I bring my own food or drinks?
faq.answer: Outside food and beverages are permitted as long as they don't create a nuisance. The venue offers snacks and non-alcoholic drinks for sale, and food trucks can be arranged for events.

faq.question: How long does it take to play 18 holes?
faq.answer: The time for 18 holes is not explicitly stated, but the facility features high-speed auto-tee systems and instant feedback to minimize downtime.

faq.question: Is Land Run Links kid-friendly?
faq.answer: Yes, the venue is family-friendly with kid-designed mini-games and challenges on the simulators. They also welcome family memberships and special events.
